data.text: P05/06 A FELISIAN WORLD WITH A SMALL, WIDE THOUGH TENUOUS
DEBRIS RING, BLUE GREEN TINT. LANDING AT 318.55 WAS IN A
SLOPING AREAS WITH A FOREST OF TREES ON A GREEN FIELD.
AT 355.60 WAS SIMILAR THOUGH BROWNISH, A DARK SPOT NOTED
WHILE LANDING THERE LED TO A DEEP CHASM WITH A BODY OF
WATER AT THE BOTTOM AND A SPIRE PEAK INSIDE A POSSIBLE
CRATER? LOCATION NEAR 26.-1, BUT CAN'Y BE MISSED. LANDING
ON 318.29 WAS THICK GRASS AND BUSHES ON ROLLING GROUND,
DURING TAKEOFF AND LANDING DEEP CANYONS ARE VISIBLE WHICH
ARE DISGUISED BY VEGETATION IN EXPLORING THE AREA. LANDING
AT 16.30 THERE IS IMMEDIATE ATTENTION TO A GOUGR IN A HILL
TOWARD THE SSW, ABD THEN A SPIRE TOWARD THE EAST IN
WATER NEAR THE SHORE. THE GROUND IS GRASSY WITH SMALL
BUSHES. THE GOUGE APPEARS TO BE CRATER-LIKE WITH ANOTHER
TALL SPIRE INSIDE AND AT THE BOTTOM A RECTANGULAR POOL OF
WATER. THE SPIRE IN THE WATER IS VERY POINTED BUT OVERALL
IRREGULAR IN SHAPE. AT 16.003 THE LANDING ON COLD BARREN
GROUND WAS IN A KIND OF TRENCH. THE NORETHERN WALL EMERGED
ON A RIDGE THAT LEADS TO A DOWNHILL SLOPE TOWARDS A BEACH
WHERE WHAT APPEARS TO BE A NOT LARGE ICEBERG IS OFFSHORE,
IT PROVED TO BE NOT ICE, BUT A POLYGONAL SOLID- ALMOST
PYRAMIDAL BUT TOO ANGULAR- LOCATED AT -63.-35 TO THE
NORTH, IN ICE WITH A STRANGE ISLAND TOO DISTANT NEARBY.
OVER THE SOUTH WALL FROM THE LANDING SITE IS MOSTLY
ROLLING GROUND AND SOME DISTANT MOUNTAINOUS GROUND, BUT A
HOPPER WAS PRESENT THERE. BIRDS ABOUND ON THIS LIFE FILLED
WORLD. THIS IS NOTHING LIKE PIECE OF ICE LOCATED HERE NEAR
THE GALAXY EDGE. PRO 0.111.960 PRV 0.189.721.104 SKINNYMON
